(Administrative fee) is heard this day. The OSC is ordered off calendar and dissolved/good cause. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice And Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Or Alternatively Order For Deemed Admissions And Order Compelling Responses To Discovery; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED.

Plaintiff Kathryn Reed's Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Or Alternatively, Order For Deemed Admissions And Order Compelling Responses To Discovery; Request For Monetary Sanctions.
Motion for terminating sanctions granted:
1. Defendants' answer to plaintiff's complaint is ordered stricken, and the clerk is ordered to entry the default of each defendant;
2. Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue against defendants, jointly and severally, in the sum of $1,590.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. Not reported. (610/PS)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanctions/ Alt, Evidentiary And/Or Monetary Sanctions And Req. For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar May-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Michael W. Blacksburg, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Kathryn Reed

No other appearance stated, tentative ruling is adopted as to Plaintiff Kathryn Reed's Motion for terminating sanctions denied.
As to Motion for evidentiary and/or monetary sanctions:
1- Evidentiary santions shall issue:
a. Defendants may not offer any testimony or evidence in support of any affirmative defense
b. Defendants are precluded at trial from denying the existence of the contract, and any amendments or modifications thereof, as alleged in plaintiff's complaint.
c. Monetary sanctions shall issue aginst defendants, payable within 30 days.
Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion is granted. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Continued To Jun-01-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice And Motion To Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And /Or Defendants' Counsel;
Off Calendar Mar-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
Plaintiff Kathryn Reed's Motion Compelling Response To Form Interrogatories And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions.
1. Plaintiff's motion to compel response to form interrogatories granted, as follows:
a. All objections, except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege are waived;
b. Within seven days of the date of service of this order, defendants America's Home Improvement Professionals, Duy V. Kieu, and Dzuyet T. Kieu shall individually provide full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's form interrogatories.
2. Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the total sum of $540.00, to run jointly and severally against defendants America's Home Improvement Professionals, Duy V. Kieu, Dzuyet T. Kieu, and their counsel of record; sanctions payable within 30 days of service of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
